title: centaurea nissana
intro: Centaurea nissana, also known as the Nissana knapweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea nissana are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it potentially beneficial for treating various health conditions. Centaurea nissana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried extracts and essential oils.
